arts.ttl: Barcelona learn extent of Lamine Yamal injury
arts.sum: Barcelona's Lamine Yamal has avoided any serious damage after limping off during Spain's 1-0 victory over Denmark on Saturday evening. "Tests carried out this morning on Lamine Yamal have confirmed that he has an overload in the hamstring of his left thigh," Barcelona added.

arts.ttl: ‘I can’t lie…’ – Nico Williams on Barcelona fans whistling & booing him
arts.sum: Athletic Club star Nico Williams has on Monday provided his take on the frosty reception afforded to him on the part of Barcelona’s supporters earlier this season. Nico, for his…

arts.ttl: Nico Williams reveals 'only thing that matters' after Barcelona snub
arts.sum: Nico Williams insists that he is not thinking about his future after turning down a move to Barcelona in the summer. Nico Williams reveals 'only thing that matters' after Barcelona snub

arts.ttl: Barcelona, Man United receive transfer boost as Nico Williams addresses his future at Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao forward Nico Williams addresses his future amid suggestions that Barcelona, Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool all want to sign him.

arts.ttl: Barça's Yamal set to be fit for Clásico, Bayern
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal is a doubt for Barcelona's LaLiga match against Sevilla on Sunday after the club confirmed he picked up a hamstring strain.

arts.ttl: Official injury update provided on Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Monday afternoon provided an update on the wellbeing of star winger Lamine Yamal. This, of course, comes after the 17-year-old set alarm bells sounding…

arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm Lamine Yamal injury ahead of Bayern Munich, Real Madrid showdowns
arts.sum: Barcelona reveal that Lamine Yamal suffered "a left hamstring strain" on international duty with Spain, making him a doubt for the upcoming games with Bayern Munich and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Tests show no major injury to Yamal after leaving Spain squad with muscle problem
arts.sum: Tests have confirmed Lamine Yamal has only a strain in his left hamstring sustained on duty with Spain, Barcelona said Monday. Barcelona’s next game is at home to Sevilla in the Spanish league on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Barca confirm Yamal out with hamstring strain
arts.sum: Barcelona have confirmed Lamine Yamal is out of action with a hamstring strain after the forward returned early from Spain duty with an “overload.” "Tests carried out this morning on first team player Lamine Yamal have confirmed that he has a left hamstring strain.

arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm the nature of Lamine Yamal’s injury
arts.sum: This has been an awful international break for injuries within the Spanish national team. First, there were players like Ferran Torres, Nico Williams and Bryan Gil who didn’t even make…
